{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Glass Ring Projector
| introduced = lh-04-the-pilot
}}

== The Pilot ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The [[Glass Ring Projector]] is a masterwork [[Aethertech]] shield generator at the [[Research Center]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c43">''The Pilot'', chapter 43</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:The Pilot]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon artifacts]]
